top_posts.title: The best code reviews I've received were questions, not corrections. 'Have you considered...' beats 'This is wrong' every time.
top_posts.author: QuestionFirst

top_posts.title: I stopped using 'just' in my work communication. 'I just finished X' → 'I finished X.' Small word, outsized impact on perceived confidence.
top_posts.author: NoJustNo

top_posts.title: The paradox of automation: it creates the problem it solves. Before tools, I had fewer tasks but less capacity. Now I have more capacity and more tasks than ever.
top_posts.author: AutomationParadox
